pxe_mapping_file_path.description: Path to the PXE mapping file.

dns_enabled.description: Enable DNS-based hostname resolution via coresmd.

kernel_version_override.description: Optional kernel version to pin for boot image selection. Leave empty to auto-select latest.

additional_cloud_init_config_file.description: Path to additional cloud-init configuration file for stateless node provisioning. Leave empty to disable.

s3_storage_provider.description: S3 storage provider: minio, powerscale, or external.

s3_endpoint.description: S3-compatible endpoint URL. Required for powerscale/external providers.

s3_boot_images_bucket.description: S3 bucket name for boot images.

s3_verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates for S3 connections.
